summary: Iteration 17 (backend-only) — per-product OG image generator + llms.txt blog section + production-host readiness. 13/13 pytest cases PASS. All required features verified end-to-end against the live preview URL (and against the direct PHP origin on localhost:3000 for Host-header rewrite checks, since the public ingress 403s on a non-matching Host — per the agent-to-agent note this is the documented approach).
critical_code_review_comments: og-product.php is well-bounded (182 lines) — disk cache key includes slug only; relies on filemtime() >= product.seo_refreshed_at AND filemtime() > now-7d so cache will naturally rebuild within 7 days. Fine for now; consider invalidating on any product UPDATE (not just SEO refresh) if pricing/image edits don't bump seo_refreshed_at.

og-product.php uses imagecreatefromwebp/png/jpeg directly — no size cap on $prodLocal. If a product.image points to a multi-MB file, GD will OOM. Add getimagesize() guard or a max-dimension check before allocating the resampled buffer.

site_url() trusting HTTP_HOST is correct for canonical/og:url rewrite, but ensure the production reverse proxy strips/normalises Host so an attacker can't poison canonicals from a crawler request. Recommend a whitelist of allowed hosts in site_url() when not in dev.
llms.txt at 30+ KB containing 59 blog URLs is fine, but consider gzip — currently served uncompressed.
seed_data_creation: Toggled settings.show_authorized_reseller_badge between '1' and '0' via mysql to verify footer/header rendering count (3 vs 0); restored to '1' on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_seo_og_iter17.py covers OG-product image (live + cache + fallback), llms.txt blog section + URL count (>=50 unique blog-post.php?id= URLs), robots.txt (4 Sitemap lines + Host-header rewrite), sitemap.xml (=59 blog-post locs), canonical/og:url Host-header rewrite on /, /shop.php, /product.php, manifest.webmanifest regression, authorized reseller toggle regression (uses correct settings key 'show_authorized_reseller_badge'), admin?tab=ai-blogger contains twitter-site-handle-input + facebook-app-id-input. Host-header tests hit http://localhost:3000 directly because the public ingress 403s on non-matching Host (agent note explicitly authorises this). PHP -l clean on all 5 files in scope. Live X-LLMs-Source header observed = 'live-template' (cache invalidation worked). First og-product call: X-OG-Source=live, 25 KB PNG written to /app/php-version/uploads/og/<slug>.png; second call: X-OG-Source=cache, identical bytes.

verified_evidence.og_product_live_bytes: first call X-OG-Source=live, ~25 KB PNG; cache file written to /app/php-version/uploads/og/microsoft-office-2024-professional-plus-windows.png
verified_evidence.og_product_cache_bytes: second call X-OG-Source=cache, bytes identical to first call
verified_evidence.robots_host_rewrite: Host: maventechsoftware.com → all Sitemap: lines contain maventechsoftware.com
verified_evidence.canonical_host_rewrite: /, /shop.php, /product.php?slug=... all emit <link rel=canonical> + og:url containing maventechsoftware.com when Host header is overridden
verified_evidence.manifest: start_url ends with ?source=pwa, icons array non-empty
verified_evidence.reseller_toggle: ON → 3 occurrences of 'Authorized Reseller' on /, OFF → 0
